description_long: This all-terrain vehicle features a robust, utilitarian design with a large, rounded front tank and two cylindrical, textured rear tanks mounted on a sturdy metal frame. The vehicle is equipped with four oversized, deep-treaded tires designed for maximum traction on rough or uneven surfaces. The front section appears to be a sealed tank, possibly for liquid or gas storage, with a visible hatch on top. The rear tanks have a rugged, segmented texture, suggesting reinforced construction for durability. The undercarriage includes a visible axle and suspension components, while the front and rear both have attachment points for towing or hitching. The overall build is industrial and functional, suitable for off-road or utility use in urban or semi-urban environments.
description: A rugged all-terrain vehicle with a large front tank, two textured rear tanks, and four deep-treaded tires on a sturdy metal frame.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded tank, four large tires, and the central axle beneath the tank.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the full length of the vehicle, the cylindrical rear tanks, and the metal frame with a hitch.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the textured rear tanks, the rear axle, and the symmetry of the tire arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the same tank and frame structure, emphasizing the rugged tire tread and metal chassis.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: The tires have a knobby, blocky tread pattern designed for all-terrain use, providing excellent grip on loose or uneven surfaces.
